hooks.command: file_path=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null) && case "$file_path" in */src/tokens/colors.css) echo 'BLOCKED: colors.css is a generated file. Do not edit it directly.' && echo 'To regenerate: pnpm generate-tokens' && echo 'To modify the token values: edit scripts/generate-tokens.js' && exit 1 ;; esac

file_path=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null) && case "$file_path" in */dist/*|*/node_modules/*|*/src/tokens/colors.css) exit 0 ;; *.vue|*.js|*.css|*.json|*.md) cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && pnpm prettier --write "$file_path" 2>/dev/null ;; esac
